Tyler spends weeks searching for her, following what she believes are signs from God. People tell her Lily is fine, but her gut says something else. Horror Elements to be Used (look at your Notes for information) Guilt Suspense Trauma Gaslighting Paranoia Setting (where will your story take place?) Main place: A dark, rainy city where everything feels heavy and cold. Ethan’s apartment: Small, messy, and lonely — shows how broken she’s become. Most of the story happens at night, especially around 2:17 a.m., a time that keeps repeating in Felisia´s dreams and real life. Characters → brief explanation of who they are/what they are like Felisia Bryant(Main Character)- A 32-year-old mother Christina heartbroken and desperate to find her daughter She is caring, strong, and faithful, but slowly starts losing her grip on reality She believes God is sending her signs, but it's not clear if it's real or in her head. Michelle (Daughter) 7 years old, sweet, innocent, and Energetic She’s the reason Raymond keeps going. Her death is the most heartbreaking part of the story. The Kidnapper (The Man in Disguise) A cold, quiet psychopath who kidnaps and tortures innocent children. He doesn’t kill for money or revenge — he kills because he enjoys control. He’s calm, smart, and terrifying. Jessica sees him in her dreams before she meets him. Vanessa A tired police detective who’s trying to help Stephanie but doesn’t really believe her. He represents the “real world” that Andrew is slowly slipping away from. FYI: I might add more characters Ending The story ends in confusion, sadness, and fear, showing how grief and faith can break a person. Horror Elements to be Used (look at your Notes for information)
Guilt
Suspense
Trauma
Gaslighting
Paranoia


Setting (where will your story take place?)
Main place: A dark, rainy city where everything feels heavy and cold.


Ethan’s apartment: Small, messy, and lonely — shows how broken she’s become.


Most of the story happens at night, especially around 2:17 a.m., a time that keeps repeating in Felisia´s dreams and real life.




Characters → brief explanation of who they are/what they are like
Felisia Bryant(Main Character)- A 32-year-old mother Christina heartbroken and desperate to find her daughter
She is caring, strong, and faithful, but slowly starts losing her grip on reality
She believes God is sending her signs, but it's not clear if it's real or in her head.
Michelle (Daughter)
7 years old, sweet, innocent, and Energetic 


She’s the reason Raymond keeps going.


Her death is the most heartbreaking part of the story.

The Kidnapper (The Man in Disguise)
A cold, quiet psychopath who kidnaps and tortures innocent children.


He doesn’t kill for money or revenge — he kills because he enjoys control.


He’s calm, smart, and terrifying. Jessica sees him in her dreams before she meets him.


Vanessa
A tired police detective who’s trying to help Stephanie but doesn’t really believe her.


He represents the “real world” that  Andrew is slowly slipping away from.
FYI: I might add more characters 


Ending
The story ends in confusion, sadness, and fear, showing how grief and faith can break a person. There will be a plot twist at the end about what really happened to Lily.
